name: my-skills
description: A visible documented engineering workflow for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Visible documented development workflow for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use My Skills to visibly route coding-session work through the mandatory using-my-skills bootstrap, then project context setup, domain language capture, lightweight documentation, implementation planning, local issue slicing, optional subagent coordination, behavior-first TDD, disciplined diagnosis, review feedback rigor, fresh verification, branch finish, and concise communication.
defaultPrompt: I want to build a feature with a lightweight documented workflow.
Help me fix this bug without skipping diagnosis or verification.
